top_categories.workout_context: 84ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Granfondo Pinarello's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before July.
Granfondo Pinarello's veneto pre-Alpine roads with sharp wall climbs forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 98 miles.
At mile 60 of 98, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
At Granfondo Pinarello, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Granfondo Pinarello. Train it until it feels boring.
8,200ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
8,200ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Granfondo Pinarello, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on veneto pre-Alpine roads with sharp wall climbs. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 98 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 8,200ft of climbing on veneto pre-Alpine roads with sharp wall climbs does to your power file on race day.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Granfondo Pinarello’s 98 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Granfondo Pinarello requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on veneto pre-alpine roads with sharp wall climbs to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on TT Threshold, Race Simulation, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 98 miles of veneto pre-alpine roads with sharp wall climbs in Treviso, Veneto, Italy.
